title: agrostis platensis
intro: Agrostis platensis, also known as colonial bent or bentgrass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Agrostis platensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Agrostis platensis are often used topically, such as in teas, infusions, or as a poultice, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
